description.content: Operations for managing landing pages
Returns a list of landing pages in the portal. You can filter by various properties and paginate through results. Both draft and published landing pages are accessible.

query.description: The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.
The maximum number of results to return per page.
Filter landing pages created at this timestamp.
Filter landing pages updated at this timestamp.
Whether to return archived landing pages.

response.name: Successful response with a list of landing pages.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new landing page with the specified content and settings. The new landing page starts in draft state and must be published to make it publicly accessible.

response.name: Landing page created successfully.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.body:
{
  "id": "500123",
  "name": "Example Record",
  "htmlTitle": "Example Record",
  "slug": "example-value",
  "state": "DRAFT",
  "currentState": "active",
  "contentTypeCategory": 100,
  "publishDate": "2025-03-15T14:30:00Z",
  "metaDescription": "This is an example description.",
  "url": "https://app.hubspot.com/contacts/12345",
  "domain": "example.hubspot.com",
  "language": "en",
  "templatePath": "/content/templates/example",
  "createdAt": "2025-03-15T14:30:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2025-03-15T14:30:00Z",
  "archived": true
}

Operations for managing site pages
Returns a list of site pages in the portal. You can filter by various properties and paginate through results. Both draft and published pages are accessible through this endpoint.

query.description: The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.
The maximum number of results to return per page.
Filter pages created at this timestamp.
Filter pages updated at this timestamp.

response.name: Successful response with a list of site pages.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new site page with the specified content and settings. The new page starts in draft state and must be published to make it publicly accessible.

response.name: Site page created successfully.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Performs a partial update of a site page. Only the properties included in the request body will be updated. Changes are applied to the draft version and must be published.

The CMS Pages API provides endpoints for creating and managing site pages and landing pages hosted on HubSpot. You can create, retrieve, update, publish, and delete both site pages and landing pages programmatically. Pages support draft and live states for content staging workflows.

Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support
